title: Urban Plaza Furniture Planner with Undo/Redo
description: The user acts as an urban architect furnishing a public plaza within a virtual city. They place, rotate, scale, and recolor SheenChair instances across designated zones of the VirtualCity model while respecting a fixed furniture budget that enforces conservation. A full undo/redo stack tracks every action.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 (importmap from cdn.jsdelivr.net) that loads VirtualCity.glb as the environment and SheenChair.glb as a placeable furniture asset. Camera: PerspectiveCamera at position (30,25,30) looking at origin with OrbitControls. Lighting: HemisphereLight (sky 0x9999ff, ground 0x444422, 0.6) plus a DirectionalLight (0xffffff, 1.2) with shadows from (20,30,10). Renderer must enable shadow maps. Ground-plane of the city receives shadows. INTERACTION DESIGN (10-14 steps expected): 1) A top HUD shows a 'Chair Budget' starting at 8 units. Each chair placed costs 1 unit; removing refunds 1 (conservation law). Budget cannot go negative. 2) Click a 'Place Chair' button, then click on any horizontal surface of the city (raycast against VirtualCity mesh) to stamp a clone of SheenChair at that point, oriented to surface normal, costing 1 budget. 3) Clicking an already-placed chair selects it (outline highlight via second render pass or emissive pulse). 4) While selected, a rotation slider (0-360) rotates the chair around its Y-axis. 5) A scale slider (0.5-2.0) resizes the selected chair; scaling above 1.5 costs an extra budget point, scaling back down refunds it (multi-input coupling with budget). 6) A color picker changes the chair's sheen/base color via MeshPhysicalMaterial.sheenColor and color. 7) A 'Delete' button removes the selected chair and refunds its budget cost. 8) Full undo/redo system: every place, delete, rotate, scale, and recolor action is pushed onto an undo stack. Ctrl+Z undoes, Ctrl+Shift+Z redoes. Undo/redo correctly restores budget. 9) A 'Reset All' button clears every chair and restores full budget (counts as one undoable action). Display chair count and remaining budget prominently. All UI controls in a semi-transparent panel on the left. Ensure placed chairs cast shadows onto the city geometry.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  chairBudget: number,         // remaining furniture units available (starts at 8)
  chairsPlaced: number,         // total count of chair instances currently in the scene
  selectedChairIndex: number,         // index of currently selected chair (-1 if none)
  selectedChairRotation: number,         // Y-axis rotation in degrees of selected chair (0-360)
  selectedChairScale: number,         // uniform scale factor of selected chair (0.5-2.0)
  undoStackDepth: number,         // count of operations available to undo
  redoStackDepth: number,         // count of operations available to redo
  largeScaleChairs: number,         // count of chairs scaled above 1.5 (each costs extra budget)
  placementMode: boolean,         // true when user has clicked Place Chair and is targeting surface
  totalOperations: number,         // cumulative count of all place/remove/modify operations performed
  cityModelLoaded: boolean,         // true when VirtualCity.glb has finished loading
  chairAssetLoaded: boolean,         // true when SheenChair.glb has finished loading
}
